nasb.text: The beginning of his kingdom was Babel and Erech and Accad and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.

esv.text: The beginning of his kingdom was Babel, Erech, Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.

cnv.text: 他開始建國是在示拿地的巴別、以力、亞甲和甲尼。

ccb.text: 他首先在示拿地区的巴别、以力、亚甲、甲尼各地建国，

csbs.text: 他的王国起始于示拿地的巴别、以力、亚甲、甲尼。
